mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1
SELECT * FROM sys_role WHERE code = #{code} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM sys_role WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (code, name, description, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{role.code}, #{role.name}, #{role.description}, #{role.status}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, NOW())
INSERT INTO sys_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, create_time) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, NOW())
